summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Heavy Hive Studios website. All core features working correctly including hero section, navigation, services, pricing, gallery, contact sections, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: Navigation menu items not visible on mobile (hidden, likely needs hamburger menu)
design_issues.note: Navigation functionality works via scrolling, but desktop nav items are hidden on mobile

passed_tests: Hero section loads with HH logo, HEAVYHIVE title, and tagline
Hero Book Now CTA button links to Peerspace correctly
All 6 services displayed: Recording, Beat Production, Mixing & Mastering, Private Events, Learning Program, Photo & Video
Pricing section shows all 3 tiers: Recording Rates (5 options), Mix & Mastering (3 options), Beat Production (1 option)
Contact section shows correct email (heavyhivestudios@gmail.com) and Instagram (@heavyhivestudios)
All Book Now buttons link to Peerspace external site
Footer contains email and Instagram links
Mobile responsiveness - all sections visible and functional on mobile
All required data-testid elements present for testing
Smooth scrolling navigation between sections works
Desktop navigation menu functional (Services, Pricing, Gallery, Contact)
